name: codraw/sonata-integration-bundle
description: Integrate compatible draw packages in Sonata admin

suggest.codraw/application: To integrate the configuration entity admin
suggest.codraw/console: To integrate the console command execution admin
suggest.codraw/cron-job: To integrate the cron job admins
suggest.codraw/entity-migrator: To integrate the entity migrator admins
suggest.codraw/messenger: To integrate the messenger message admin
suggest.codraw/security: To use the admin login authenticator of the user integration
suggest.codraw/user-bundle: To integrate the user management (login, password change, user locks, 2FA)
suggest.scheb/2fa-bundle: To integrate the 2FA management in the user admin
suggest.scheb/2fa-email: To use the 2FA by email integration (resend code action)
suggest.scheb/2fa-totp: To use the 2FA by TOTP integration
